entities.description: As a subsection of 'Other Design Considerations', this section discusses the retention of the USB3.1OTG interface, which is a hardware design feature relevant to the SOM-TL3588 industrial core board.
Refers to the Universal Serial Bus 3.1 On-The-Go (OTG) interface, a hardware component retained as per the design considerations in section 5.2.2.

relations.description: The hardware component 'USB3.1OTG 接口' is the primary focus of section 5.2.2.
